scope: local inference only; no Kattis submission

anchor_pipeline.interpretation: stable 81.93/81.94 7/7 plateau; exact notes identify 19901232 as 81.93457

score_evidence.signature: anchor plus small B16/S3B16 variants in 1181
score_evidence.read: safe plateau; direct B16 ridge mostly saturated
lower case5 B16-only patch hurts despite acceptance

score_evidence.signature: UG periodic/grid special or broad 47501..85000 B16 replacing anchor B16
score_evidence.read: special branch/router can damage one hidden case badly

score_evidence.signature: aggressive STARX/KCM/high-count B16 or late special branch
score_evidence.read: broad structural replacement is dangerous without tight classifier
generic simplification passes some cases but misses high-value routed cases

archetypes.name: tiny_sample_or_simple_primitive
evidence: low accepted files include tryTinySampleBox and N0==9 sample special cases

archetypes.name: case3_periodic_torus_grid
archetypes.mesh_signature: M == 2*N, factorable wrapped grid U,V in 80..320
hurts: generalizing periodic recognizer outside guarded band

archetypes.name: core_midband_smooth_case5
archetypes.mesh_signature: smooth AS normal classifier; low BG/AH, high AL/BL
evidence: anchor W5/VIMP/MIDEC/WK/B16 all target this band
helps: B16 second pass count 74..76 stride -10 vp192 q .960..961

archetypes.name: lower_case5_uv_or_torus_ripple
archetypes.mesh_signature: very smooth lower slice; S4 guard AS && BG<=0.001 && BL>=0.985 && Z<=0.0037

archetypes.name: upper_case5_boxy_softbox
evidence: S14 upper_aggr improves r5_uv50623_boxy and s8_uv50402_softbox by about 105..111 vertices
helps: S14_07 upper aggressive with orientation-safe rollback

archetypes.name: case6_high_mid_smooth
helps: late B16 after preserving anchor, narrowed to 60001..120000 first

archetypes.name: very_high_n_smooth_uv_box_or_torus
archetypes.mesh_signature: large smooth or AABB/box shell; classifier must be very tight

archetypes.name: generic_irregular_or_sharp_mesh
archetypes.mesh_signature: not smooth enough for AS smooth route or primitive recognizers
evidence: recent generic QEM submissions score 40..57 with 4/7 or 5/7
helps: generic fallback if all structural branches no-op
hurts: using generic simplifier as main route

missing_for_10_point_jump: orientation-safe rollback for case5 upper/lower patches
high-resolution or baseline-relative proxy gating for high-N branches
tournament routers for MIDEC/WK/B16 order rather than more raw B16 count sweeps
strict no-op behavior on non-target rough-phase, UV, torus, and box proxies

experiments.name: lower_case5_s4_08_tournament
experiments.keep_condition: cove drop, strong topology, vps512 >= baseline - .001, rough-phase veto

experiments.name: upper_case5_s14_07_orientation_safe
experiments.keep_condition: cove drop, HS, orientation-conflict check, vps512 floor

experiments.name: midband_pass_order_tournament
experiments.keep_condition: strictly lower cove and vps512 >= baseline - .001

experiments.name: strict_case6_late_b16
experiments.branch: B16::R with vp128 q .965 after preserving anchor
experiments.keep_condition: no cove increase, validator, high proxy floor

experiments.name: extra_vimp_high_mid
experiments.branch: one extra VIMP pass with S15 guards
experiments.keep_condition: minimum cove gain and vps512/256 relative floor

experiments.name: high_n_box_shell_ab19
experiments.keep_condition: box-face tolerance, grid coverage, vps512>=.992, no-op on non-box proxies

experiments.name: torus_ripple_dcdeep
experiments.branch: BROAD_30 DC-deep table only under torus/ripple recognizer
experiments.keep_condition: topology valid, full rollback, no-op on uv/box/rough proxies

avoid: B16-only lower case5 49843..50233 count 140 stride -5 vp224 q .958
late passes that omit or replace B16::R(39000,60000,76,-10,192,.96,18.35)
unguarded S4/R13 lower patch that catches rough-phase
